name: Saksiam Leasing Public Company Limited
summary: Saksiam Leasing Public Company Limited provides financial services in Thailand. It offers personal loans, secured loans, nano finance under supervision, and hire purchase loans. As of December 31, 2020, it operates 519 branches and service centers. Saksiam Leasing Public Company Limited is incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Uttaradit, Thailand.
